description: Cursor test machines registry. Update when adding a lab PC; do not put secrets or personal home-directory paths in the committed copy — prefer placeholders and keep real paths in a local override or deploy.config.json.

coordination.notes: Cross-machine harness: each machine writes obj/harness-coord.json (gitignored) for live status. Persistent shared history: test-logs/ (git). Cross-machine alerts: test-logs/alerts/. New machine: deploy.config.json + setup-test-machine.ps1 (see docs/test-environments.md).

machines.notes: Primary dev + full harness. Set real paths locally; deploy.config.json testMachine=1号机.
